channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: One of the videos, which has got 70 million views and claims to be of an Iranian missile attacking a US fighter jet, is actually from a video game. #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: One of the videos, which has got 70 million views and claims to be of an Iranian missile attacking a US fighter jet, is actually from a video game. #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Supporters of US President Donald Trump gathered at a Republican rally in Waco, Texas, ahead of the state’s primary elections. #DonaldTrump #MiddleEast #Iran #Texas #Waco #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Supporters of US President Donald Trump gathered at a Republican rally in Waco, Texas, ahead of the state’s primary elections. #DonaldTrump #MiddleEast #Iran #Texas #Waco #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: US Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem testified before a Senate committee, defending her record as head of a department that is currently under fire for how it is carrying out President Donald Trump's massive immigration enforcement campaign. #Kristi
item.description: US Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem testified before a Senate committee, defending her record as head of a department that is currently under fire for how it is carrying out President Donald Trump's massive immigration enforcement campaign. #Kristi

item.title: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian called the incident a "barbaric act". The US military said it was looking into reports of the incident, while Israel's military said it was "not aware" of any operations in the area. #Iran #Minab #MiddleEast #News #BBCNe
item.description: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian called the incident a "barbaric act". The US military said it was looking into reports of the incident, while Israel's military said it was "not aware" of any operations in the area. #Iran #Minab #MiddleEast #News #BBCNe

item.title: Air travel in the Middle East has been severely disrupted since Saturday, with thousands of flights cancelled. #UKNews #Iran #Dubai #MiddleEast #Travel #Flights #BBCNews
item.description: Air travel in the Middle East has been severely disrupted since Saturday, with thousands of flights cancelled. #UKNews #Iran #Dubai #MiddleEast #Travel #Flights #BBCNews

item.title: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirmed a drone had struck a "parking lot" next to the consulate's chancellery building on Tuesday night, and said "all personnel are accounted for". #Dubai #US #USConsulate #Drone #Strike #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirmed a drone had struck a "parking lot" next to the consulate's chancellery building on Tuesday night, and said "all personnel are accounted for". #Dubai #US #USConsulate #Drone #Strike #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Both occupants of the hot air balloon were rescued by emergency workers in Longview, Texas, after it became entangled in a radio tower about 920ft (280m) above the ground. #Balloons #HotAirBalloon #Rescue #Texas #BBCNews
item.description: Both occupants of the hot air balloon were rescued by emergency workers in Longview, Texas, after it became entangled in a radio tower about 920ft (280m) above the ground. #Balloons #HotAirBalloon #Rescue #Texas #BBCNews

item.title: Israel says it has hit "security headquarters" and dozens of military targets across Iran's capital Tehran, as its airstrikes continue. #Iran #Tehran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Israel says it has hit "security headquarters" and dozens of military targets across Iran's capital Tehran, as its airstrikes continue. #Iran #Tehran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Spain has barred the US from using its military bases as part of its operation in Iran. The Spanish government also previously refused Donald Trump's demands for NATO allies to increase their defence spending, unlike many other European countries. It's un
item.description: Spain has barred the US from using its military bases as part of its operation in Iran. The Spanish government also previously refused Donald Trump's demands for NATO allies to increase their defence spending, unlike many other European countries. It's un

item.title: Rescuers inspect the rubble in Lebanon's capital, Beirut, following an overnight Israeli strike. Israel's military says it struck Hezbollah targets in Lebanon, after the Iranian-backed Shia group said it launched rockets and drones at the Israeli city of
item.description: Rescuers inspect the rubble in Lebanon's capital, Beirut, following an overnight Israeli strike. Israel's military says it struck Hezbollah targets in Lebanon, after the Iranian-backed Shia group said it launched rockets and drones at the Israeli city of

item.title: 'Baby brain' can seem like a downside of pregnancy - but is it actually a good thing? #BabyBrain #Pregnancy #Health #BBCNews
item.description: 'Baby brain' can seem like a downside of pregnancy - but is it actually a good thing? #BabyBrain #Pregnancy #Health #BBCNews

item.title: Sri Lanka’s navy has confirmed that they have rescued 32 people after it received a distress call from Iranian navy ship ‘IRIS Dena’ early on Wednesday, but with around 140 still missing. #Iran #MiddleEast #SriLanka #Navy #BBCNews
item.description: Sri Lanka’s navy has confirmed that they have rescued 32 people after it received a distress call from Iranian navy ship ‘IRIS Dena’ early on Wednesday, but with around 140 still missing. #Iran #MiddleEast #SriLanka #Navy #BBCNews

item.title: Three men, one of whom is the partner of a Labour MP, the BBC has been told, have been arrested in London and Wales on suspicion of assisting Chinese intelligence services in the UK, the Metropolitan Police has said. #UK #China #Spy #CrimeTok #BBCNews
item.description: Three men, one of whom is the partner of a Labour MP, the BBC has been told, have been arrested in London and Wales on suspicion of assisting Chinese intelligence services in the UK, the Metropolitan Police has said. #UK #China #Spy #CrimeTok #BBCNews

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has said a torpedo from a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean "that thought it was safe in international waters". #Iran #US #MiddleEast #Submarine #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has said a torpedo from a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean "that thought it was safe in international waters". #Iran #US #MiddleEast #Submarine #BBCNews

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said the operation in Iran was "never meant to be a fair fight" and the US are "punching" Iran "while they're down." #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said the operation in Iran was "never meant to be a fair fight" and the US are "punching" Iran "while they're down." #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews

item.title: Pressed by BBC on whether there’s any clarity on whose munition struck a school in Iran - an attack that Iranian officials say has killed at least 153 people, including many children - US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said that "we're investigating".#Ira
item.description: Pressed by BBC on whether there’s any clarity on whose munition struck a school in Iran - an attack that Iranian officials say has killed at least 153 people, including many children - US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said that "we're investigating".#Ira

item.title: HMS Dragon, the UK warship which is set to be deployed to help protect Cyprus after attacks on a British base there during the US-Israel war in Iran, won't set sail until next week. #UK #Cyprus #Iran #US #BBCNews
item.description: HMS Dragon, the UK warship which is set to be deployed to help protect Cyprus after attacks on a British base there during the US-Israel war in Iran, won't set sail until next week. #UK #Cyprus #Iran #US #BBCNews

item.title: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #India #Holi #Spring #Colour #BBCNews
item.description: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #India #Holi #Spring #Colour #BBCNews

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has described Iranian forces as being "toast" as a result of the "sheer destruction" at the hands of US and Israeli forces. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has described Iranian forces as being "toast" as a result of the "sheer destruction" at the hands of US and Israeli forces. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews

item.title: The Comfort Hotel, in Lebanon, sustained serious damage after it was hit by an Israeli air strike, and witnesses say its receptionist was badly injured and taken to hospital. #Beirut #Lebanon #Hotel #BBCNews
item.description: The Comfort Hotel, in Lebanon, sustained serious damage after it was hit by an Israeli air strike, and witnesses say its receptionist was badly injured and taken to hospital. #Beirut #Lebanon #Hotel #BBCNews

item.title: PM Keir Starmer was asked if his response to the week's events had made the UK's relationship with the US "stronger or weaker?" #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Iran #Diplomacy #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: PM Keir Starmer was asked if his response to the week's events had made the UK's relationship with the US "stronger or weaker?" #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Iran #Diplomacy #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: Iran has retaliated to US-Israeli air strikes by firing hundreds of missiles and drones at its Arab neighbours, targeting American military bases on their soil. But in doing so, it is targeting the Gulf's image as a safe hub for travel, tourism and financ
item.description: Iran has retaliated to US-Israeli air strikes by firing hundreds of missiles and drones at its Arab neighbours, targeting American military bases on their soil. But in doing so, it is targeting the Gulf's image as a safe hub for travel, tourism and financ

item.title: Israel has announced new "broad scale" attacks across Tehran, and said it is targeting regime infrastructure. #Tehran #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Israel has announced new "broad scale" attacks across Tehran, and said it is targeting regime infrastructure. #Tehran #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: More chartered flights will be organised for Britons stranded in the Middle East "in the coming days", UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said, adding eight commercial flights will also be leaving the United Arab Emirates on Wednesday. #Oman #Muscat #Dubai #M
item.description: More chartered flights will be organised for Britons stranded in the Middle East "in the coming days", UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said, adding eight commercial flights will also be leaving the United Arab Emirates on Wednesday. #Oman #Muscat #Dubai #M

item.title: The UK is still working closely with the US, the government insists, after President Donald Trump said the relationship was "obviously not what it was”. #Iran #UK #US #Politics #BBCNews
item.description: The UK is still working closely with the US, the government insists, after President Donald Trump said the relationship was "obviously not what it was”. #Iran #UK #US #Politics #BBCNews

item.title: Protesters outside OpenAI’s San Francisco headquarters rallied against the company’s Pentagon deal, which was signed shortly after rival Anthropic’s fallout with the Defense Department over concerns about AI use in surveillance and autonomous weapons. Aft
item.description: Protesters outside OpenAI’s San Francisco headquarters rallied against the company’s Pentagon deal, which was signed shortly after rival Anthropic’s fallout with the Defense Department over concerns about AI use in surveillance and autonomous weapons. Aft

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth says a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean with a torpedo. It's thought around 180 people were on board the Iris Dena. #Iran #US #Warship #MiddleEast #Torpedo #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth says a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean with a torpedo. It's thought around 180 people were on board the Iris Dena. #Iran #US #Warship #MiddleEast #Torpedo #BBCNews

item.title: More than 100,000 Britons have registered for UK government help in the Middle East. #MiddleEast #Iran #Israel #US #BBCNews
item.description: More than 100,000 Britons have registered for UK government help in the Middle East. #MiddleEast #Iran #Israel #US #BBCNews

item.title: The UK government will stop issuing study visas to people from Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan from this month. #UKGovernment #Visa #StudyVisa #BBCNews
item.description: The UK government will stop issuing study visas to people from Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan from this month. #UKGovernment #Visa #StudyVisa #BBCNews

item.title: A petrol forecourt owner told BBC Newsbeat the cost of rising fuel prices caused by the Israel-US war with Iran will have to be passed on to customers soon. #Petrol #Energy #Gas #Prices #US #Iran #Oil #BBCNews
item.description: A petrol forecourt owner told BBC Newsbeat the cost of rising fuel prices caused by the Israel-US war with Iran will have to be passed on to customers soon. #Petrol #Energy #Gas #Prices #US #Iran #Oil #BBCNews
